system.description:
After spending countless hours in your workshop, your work is finally complete. With whirring gears, your companion springs to life, ready to join you on your adventures.

Just like the other Artificer inventions, you can flavour your companion however you want — a golem, a steampunk robot, a magitech construct, or whatever else you can imagine.

LEVEL 3

It Lives! You have created a medium-sized mechanical companion. It moves for free on your turn and has 5 HP/LVL. Your companion has 2 module slots that can hold one of your major inventions or a companion module. Powered by your Mana Dice. Includes Repair Kit (INT/Safe Rest).

LEVEL 7

Modular Expansion (1). Companion gains another module slot. Synchronized Strike. When you Attack, your companion gains a free Mana Die to attack the same target. Superconductor. Increment your Mana Dice one step.

LEVEL 11

Modular Expansion (2). Companion gains another module slot. Static Discharge. (1/encounter) Spend 2+ Mana Dice with advantage; enemies within 2 spaces take dice + INT damage.

LEVEL 15

Modular Expansion (3). Companion gains another module slot. Overclock Protocol. (1/Safe Rest) Maximize all Mana Dice for companion abilities this turn. Independent Power Supply. +1 max Mana Die.

Companion Modules: Heavy Chassis (Stomp! AoE, Telescopic Arms / Steel Bulwark upgrades), Rocket Engines (fly via Mana Dice, Boosters upgrade), Electrified Chassis (retaliate damage, Armored Carapace / Structural Reinforcement upgrades).
